creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ports are included in the pkg-fallout "list" when they fail to build for whatever reason. The next time the package builders try to build math/emc2 it should work.

The port has a few issues. Can you:

* Make sure all the issues reported by portlint/portclippy are fixed
* Change MAINTAINER to your email address

Thanks!
